chapter_title.en: Chapter 13 – The one for whom there is no wergild

text: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ بَيْنَا رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) فِي حُجُرَاتِهِ مَعَ بَعْضِ أَزْوَاجِهِ وَ مَعَهُ مَغَازِلُ لَهُ يَقْلِبُهَا إِذْ بَصُرَ بِعَيْنَيْنِ تَطَّلِعَانِ فَقَالَ لَوْ أَعْلَمُ أَنَّكَ تَثْبُتُ لِي لَقُمْتُ حَتَّى أَبْخَسَكَ فَقُلْتُ نَفْعَلُ نَحْنُ مِثْلَ هَذَا إِنْ فُعِلَ مِثْلُهُ بِنَا قَالَ إِنْ خَفِيَ لَكَ فَافْعَلْهُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Hammad Bin Isa, from Al Husayn Bin Al Mukhtar, from Ubeyd Bin Zurara who said,

‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘While Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> was in his<sup>saww</sup> chamber with one of his<sup>saww</sup> wives, and with him<sup>asws</sup> was a spindle of his<sup>saww</sup> which he<sup>saww</sup> was turning, when he<sup>saww</sup> saw two eye peeking at him<sup>saww</sup>. So he<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘If I<sup>saww</sup> knew that you would remain there for me<sup>saww</sup>, I<sup>saww</sup> would arise until I<sup>saww</sup> blind you’. So I said, ‘Shall we do the like of this, if the like of this is done with us?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘If it is hidden for you (you are not seen), so do it’.
